entities.name: RAINWATER
entities.description: Main source of water for agriculture in semi-arid tropics

entities.name: AGRICULTURE
entities.description: The science and practice of farming

entities.name: CROP PRODUCTION
entities.description: The process of growing crops for food or other uses

entities.name: SURFACE RUNOFF
entities.description: Rainwater that flows over the land surface rather than soaking in

entities.name: DEEP DRAINAGE
entities.description: Water that percolates beyond the root zone of crops

entities.name: INTEGRATED WATERSHED MANAGEMENT
entities.description: A holistic approach to managing water and land resources within a watershed

entities.name: SEMI-ARID TROPICS
entities.description: Regions characterized by low and erratic rainfall and high temperatures

entities.name: ASIA
entities.description: The continent where the rainwater management strategies are applied

entities.name: DOUBLE-CROPPING
entities.description: The practice of growing two crops on the same piece of land in a single year

entities.name: GROUNDWATER
entities.description: Water stored beneath the earth's surface in aquifers

entities.name: IN SITU CONSERVATION OF RAINWATER
entities.description: The practice of conserving rainwater where it falls on the farm

entities.name: COMMUNITY DRAINAGE CHANNELS
entities.description: Low-cost structures used to safely remove excess water from fields

entities.name: SURFACE IRRIGATION
entities.description: The application of water to the soil surface for crop growth

entities.name: IMPROVED VARIETIES
entities.description: Crop varieties developed through breeding for higher productivity or stress tolerance

entities.name: CROPPING SYSTEMS
entities.description: The spatial and temporal arrangement of crops on a given area

entities.name: NUTRIENT MANAGEMENT
entities.description: The optimization of nutrient application to increase crop productivity

entities.name: PEST-MANAGEMENT
entities.description: The use of strategies to control pests and protect crops

entities.name: PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of agricultural output per unit of land or input

entities.name: NATURAL RESOURCES
entities.description: Environmental assets such as soil and water

entities.name: VERTISOLS
entities.description: Clay-rich soils that shrink and swell with moisture changes

entities.name: FOOD GRAINS
entities.description: Cereal crops produced for human consumption

entities.name: SOIL LOSS
entities.description: The degradation and removal of the topsoil layer

entities.name: TRADITIONAL METHODS OF CULTIVATION
entities.description: Conventional farming practices used before the adoption of integrated management

entities.name: COMMUNITY PARTICIPATION
entities.description: The involvement of local communities in the management of resources

entities.name: CAPACITY BUILDING
entities.description: The process of developing technical skills and knowledge at the local level

entities.name: SCIENTIFIC TOOLS
entities.description: New technical instruments used for efficient watershed management

entities.name: POLICY AND INSTITUTIONAL SUPPORT
entities.description: Governmental and organizational frameworks required to scale up management practices
